scribe workflow

will work as a harness for ged and control the workflow of a spec from the planning phase to design and deployment

1. draft uploaded to scribe, rough outline of a feature that an agent needs to review/refactor into a proper spec
2. written spec waits for review/refactor into an implementation plan
3. written spec and implementaion plan pass review/refactor loop
4. implementation plan locked by scribe, scoped to agent
3. written spec and implementation plan are used as context for design
5. start implementation, design get a summary of changes for context each phase, scribe gets a progress update each phase
6. finish implementation plan, final refactor/review loop, finish design
7. commit and deploy
